puc_exemption_clause: Rule 115 of Central Motor Vehicles Rules (CMVR), 1989 exempts battery-operated vehicles (BOVs) from tailpipe emission test certificates.

registration_rules.fee_waiver: CMVR Rule 81 exempts electric vehicles from payment of fees for issue or renewal of registration certificate.
registration_rules.plate_color: Mandatory green background plate. Private EVs: White lettering. Commercial/Transport EVs: Yellow lettering.

charging_zone_restrictions.non_ev_parking_section: Section 177 - Obstruction to traffic and misuse of dedicated charging berths.

Tamil Nadu.additional_incentives: 100% road tax waiver for all EVs till December 2025

Karnataka.additional_incentives: 100% exemption on road tax and registration fees for all EVs

Uttar Pradesh.note: 100% tax and registration waiver for first 3 years of EV policy (since Oct 2022)

insurance_requirements.irdai_circular_ref: IRDA/NL/REG/MOT/2019 - Mandatory third-party insurance discounts for clean energy vehicles.
insurance_requirements.battery_pack_coverage: Own Damage (OD) insurance must specify separate replacement value for the Lithium-ion battery, representing up to 50% of total vehicle IDV.

e_rickshaw.national_highways: Prohibited in fast lanes; allowed only on service lanes

high_speed_above_25kmh.expressways: Prohibited for vehicles under 50cc equivalent (less than 4kW)
